name: Thunder Hammer

style_guide_alignment.gold_sacred: Hammer head and grip bands use sacred gold with metallic sheen
style_guide_alignment.pale_stone: Handle shaft and strike faces use pale stone/electrum
style_guide_alignment.lightning_core: Blue-white energy channel through head with glow nodes at endpoints
style_guide_alignment.readable_silhouette: Distinct T-shape hammer profile readable during combat motion

next_gate: UE5 import, attach to character socket, Play-In-Editor combat feel test
